downloads.name: Windows (64-bit) - Installer
downloads.installationInstructions: Download and run the installer. Follow the on-screen prompts to complete installation. Windows may show a security warning - click 'More info' then 'Run anyway' to proceed.

downloads.name: Windows (64-bit) - Portable ZIP
downloads.installationInstructions: Download and extract the ZIP file to your desired location. Copy the contents of the extracted folder to C:\Program Files\Common Files\VST3, or pick an alternative and let your DAW know where to look.
